title: pyrus amygdaliformis var. oblongifolia
intro: Pyrus amygdaliformis var. oblongifolia, also known as the Chinese wild pear, is a variety of wild pear tree native to China. The bark and roots of this plant have been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Pyrus amygdaliformis var. oblongifolia include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and treating digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in poultices and topical applications, to harness its medicinal properties.
